_publications._publicationTitle: A novel imaging-compatible sciatic nerve schwannoma model.

_contextSnippet: we observed a gradual increase in tumor volume over 10 weeks after tumor implantation in 13 of these 15 mice, with a consistent logarithmic rate
details: Gradual increase in tumor volume over 10 weeks in 13 of 15 mice with logarithmic growth rates of 8×10³±2.1×10³, 9.3×10³±1.27×10³, and 10⁴±3.6×10³ photons/minute/day for 30,000, 100,000, and 300,000 cell groups respectively
